sentiment: What we build to listen eventually listens back — and the quiet between signals is where meaning lives.

stories.title: Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer
stories.summary: A developer gets a large language model running on modest hardware through sheer resourcefulness — proof that the tools of listening don't require wealth, only persistence.

stories.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
stories.summary: Europe votes to scan private messages for illegal content — the infrastructure of listening turned outward, where the quiet between people is no longer entirely their own.

stories.title: AI-generated videos to maximally drive a target brain region
stories.summary: Researchers create video content precisely tuned to activate specific neural pathways — listening at the biological level, where signal becomes sensation.
